violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. List of certification programs provided. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized; ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the sani bucket was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. Sanitizer disposed, bucket was refilled to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the following areas, are not tight-fitting: -glass doors -rear hallway -loading dock. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC stated areas are scheduled for remodel end of this year. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. PIC obtained test strips from neighboring establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC stated they are presently enrolled in a food safety manager course. Inspector provided FMC application. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service; PIC contacted hotel maintenance to clean and sanitize machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the following areas, are not tight-fitting: -glass front door -back hallway -trash/receiving area. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cup holders and powder containers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024

The refuse/receiving area was observed with an accumulation of pallets, unused equipment, cardboard, and other debris. Refuse areas must be maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
The carboard dumpster was observed overflowing with cardboard at the time of inspection. Dumpsters must be emptied at a frequency that meets establishment needs. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The wall/floor juncture in the dry storage area was observed to be in poor repair. The coving was missing, exposing opening in the wall. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
